sub_modules.highpass_fir_tap_window: Combinational tap-vector packer that combines the current signed input sample with the registered delay-line contents.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM exposing the required 101 signed Q15 high-pass FIR coefficients verbatim.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac: Combinational signed multiply-accumulate over all 101 taps using a 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_q15_scale: Combinational fixed-point normalization stage using arithmetic right shift by 15.
